test_name: Verify User Login with Okta OAuth
description: This scenario tests logging in using Okta OAuth and confirms that the user is directed to the dashboard following successful authentication.
steps: Find and click on the 'Sign in with Okta' link.
Enter Okta account credentials on the Okta login page.
If prompted, complete the two-factor authentication.
Verify redirection to the dashboard at https://dev.roost.ai.
Ensure the user's profile is displayed, confirming login success.
expected_results: User is directed to Okta login page.
Redirected to the dashboard at https://dev.roost.ai.
User profile is visible on the dashboard.
edge_cases: Two-factor authentication is required but not completed.
User's Okta account lacks necessary permissions.
dependencies: Operational Okta login and authentication services.
api_interactions: Fetch user profile data after login.
performance_metrics: Time for redirection to Okta and back.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure OAuth links can be accessed via keyboard.
Screen reader compatibility for Okta login page.
Check for adequate color contrast for usability.
